steps.t: Faelleron is beneath a flet on the north-western edge of the Golden Wood, near the border with Fanuidhol. Bingo wants to prove that he is not afraid o…
Faelleron is south-east of Fanuidhol, on the border of Lothlórien. You have defeated some of the Orcs that threaten the Golden Wood, and should now re…
Bingo is south-east of Fanuidhol, on the border of Lothlórien, with Faelleron. You have defeated some of the Orcs that threaten the Golden Wood, and s…
Calengoth is at the docks of Lothlórien, west of Imlad Lalaith. You have attained the permission to fight the enemies of Lothlórien for which Bingo ho…
Bingo has arrived in Mirkwood, and he has naturally gone to the first tavern he could find: the Haunted Inn of the Dourstocks, west of Audaghaim.
Bingo has asked you to find a number of locations near the Haunted Inn and <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb> at them closely to help him learn about…
Bingo is by the fire inside the Haunted Inn, in the Dourstocks.
